lesson_title: Daily Life and Social Communication: Vocabulary Lesson 2
learning_objective: Learners can describe, compare and exchange simple information in a vocabulary task about shopping.
cefr_outcome: Learners can communicate in simple and routine tasks requiring direct exchange of information.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise vocabulary for daily life and social communication. You will learn useful language connected to shopping and practise present continuous. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at A2 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: present continuous. Vocabulary theme: shopping. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At A2, learners should describe, compare and exchange simple information with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use present continuous to talk about shopping.
Example 2: The learner gives a A2 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for A2.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using present continuous.
options: Correct use of present continuous in a A2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with present continuous.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses present continuous accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of present continuous.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the shopping phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand shopping.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand shopping.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form present continuous. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about shopping using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: A2 Vocabulary Check - Daily Life and Social Communication
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short vocabulary task using present continuous and vocabulary from shopping.
success_criteria: Uses present continuous with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses present continuous and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to shopping.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about shopping. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short A2 response about shopping. Include the target language: present continuous.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for A2-M01-L02. Speaker one: Today we are practising shopping. Speaker two: I need to use present continuous correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Present Continuous form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for present continuous
